emc_definition: Normalized entropy of the aggregate soft mode-occupancy probabilities, so 0 indicates single-mode collapse and 1 indicates uniform coverage across the predefined mode descriptors.
emc_descriptor_description: Two dominant minima of the ring potential at (-1, 0) and (1, 0).
sinkhorn_divergence_definition: Debiased Sinkhorn divergence built from the regularized OT objective.
sinkhorn_ot_cost_definition: Regularized OT objective with entropy term, matching the configured benchmark formula.
